engine.name: Exact Quran transcript matcher
engine.method: Use local whisper.cpp to transcribe the first recitation audio window, normalize the transcript and reviewed Quran text the same way, then accept only a unique exact contiguous Quran match. Multiple matches are shown as candidates for user choice. No nearest match is allowed.
engine.reviewNote: Selected free local ASR path: whisper.cpp. Not production-ready until whisper.cpp, the multilingual model, and Quran-recitation transcript matching are installed and validated locally.
